name: Louis Vuitton Monogram Mini Canvas Agenda PM 6-Ring Planner Cover Navy - LO2183
description:
Keep your days elegantly organized with this charming Louis Vuitton Agenda PM. Beautifully crafted from the brand's vintage-inspired Monogram Mini canvas in a versatile navy hue, this sophisticated planner cover features a secure snap-button closure. The interior is lined with durable cross-grain leather and is equipped with a versatile 6-ring binder, convenient card slots, and slip pockets, making it the perfect stylish accessory for both professional and personal use.

Size: PM Size (Approximately W:10cm x H:14.5cm x D:2cm)  Material: Monogram Mini Canvas and Cross-Grain Leather Lining Hardware: Gold-Tone Features: 6-ring binder mechanism, 3 interior credit card slots, 2 interior slip pockets, and a snap button closure. Inclusions: Carefully packaged for safe delivery.
